prompt: Design a RetailOps Insight & Compliance Console to manage multi-store retail master data, customer communications, and content/risk controls in a fully offline browser application. The primary users are Administrator (sets up organizations, roles, and policies), Store Manager (maintains store-level data and handles customer tickets), Analyst (runs and reviews text analytics), and Reviewer (performs compliance and risk handling). The app provides a single-page, responsive workspace with Svelte-driven views and frontend routing: an Organization Setup screen uses a Tree view and editable Table to define company → factory → store → warehouse hierarchies, while Master Data screens manage style SKU, color, size, season, brand, supplier, and customer records with version history. Master data changes are made via Modal forms, require a reason note (minimum 10 characters), and publish as a new version; only one active version per entity type is allowed per organization, and deactivated records cannot be referenced by new styles. A Customer CRM area includes profile preferences such as allergies/material restrictions (max 500 characters, flagged on orders), membership tiers (Bronze/Silver/Gold) with optional points and stored value tracked in USD to two decimals, service ratings (1–5 stars), and after-sales tickets with SLA timers (default 48 hours). A Notification & Messaging Center supports in-app only (offline constraint), with channel configuration, subscription rules, templates, and a send queue that triggers on publish/deadline/grading/announcements as well as order progress and ticket updates; templates enforce variable placeholders (e.g., {CustomerName}, {OrderId}) and a 160-character limit for compact notices, while delivery status moves through Draft → Queued → Sent → Failed with up to 3 retries at 1, 5, and 15 minutes. An NLP Analysis workspace lets Analysts run offline keyword/summary extraction, topic clustering/classification, sentiment, NER, and entity disambiguation on imported text files, supporting batch runs and incremental “analyze new notes” for CRM updates; each run stores model version labels (e.g., v1.2) and quality metrics (precision/recall targets configurable, default alert if F1 < 0.70). A Content & Risk Review inbox supports configurable machine rules plus manual review for item content, sensitive-word matching (local dictionary), basic image file-type validation (PNG/JPEG only, max 5 MB), and abnormal bidding/shill heuristics based on frequency thresholds and local device fingerprinting (non-unique hash) and linked account patterns, generating closed-loop alerts that must be resolved with an outcome code and comment. Built as a Svelte pure frontend SPA, all business logic runs in a browser “service layer” that processes mock data and locally imported JSON configurations; no servers, no external APIs, and no network-required channels (no SMS, email sending, WeChat, or OAuth). Data persists in IndexedDB for structured entities (org trees, master data versions, CRM, tickets, message queue, NLP runs, risk cases) and LocalStorage for lightweight UI preferences (last selected store, table column layouts). Import/export is required for portability: Admins can export a full encrypted backup as a JSON file via Blob/FileSaver and import it on another machine, with schema validation and a preview diff before applying. Authentication is local-only username + password with password rules (minimum 12 characters, at least one number and one symbol), optional guest trial mode capped at 30 minutes and read-only, and account linking/deactivation handled entirely on-device; role-based access controls drive menu visibility and data scopes down to organization/store/warehouse. Sensitive fields (stored value, allergy notes) are masked by default and encrypted at rest using Web Crypto with an app passphrase-derived key; the app auto-locks after 10 minutes of inactivity and requires re-entry of the password to decrypt protected data.
